## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss article polish standards and client management strategies across different accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Polish levels vary by client, with some requiring more intensive review than others](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Most teams use Grammarly and have multi-layer review processes (CM, ME, Director)](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=4.0)
  - [Client feedback loops and trust-building are crucial for reducing review intensity over time](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Organized task management and clear client-facing spaces are needed to manage workloads and expectations](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=20.0)

## Topics

### Article Polish and Review Processes

  - [Review intensity varies by client and content manager experience](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Most teams use Grammarly for initial grammar checks](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Multi-layer review process: CM → ME → Director (in some cases)](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Some clients (e.g., Smith, School AI) review every piece before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)
  - [Others trust the team to publish without approval](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)

### Client Management and Expectations

  - [Building trust over time allows for less intensive client reviews](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [Some clients (e.g., Seat) still provide feedback on every article despite long-term engagement](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [Strategies for managing client expectations:](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1311.0)
      - [Visualize all work streams and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1319.0)
      - [Use a prioritization system to focus efforts](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1360.0)
      - [Clearly communicate capacity limits and trade-offs](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### Content Quality and Pipeline Issues

  - [Metronome pipeline producing low-quality content, possibly due to scope creep and semantic issues](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=949.0)
  - [Suggestion to reintroduce style adapters in pipelines to reinforce writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Importance of clear, contextual artifacts for LLM understanding](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1001.0)

### Workflow and Tool Improvements

  - [Ask.ai tool now has a sidebar interface for easier editing](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Suggestion for a unified task list across clients for directors](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1611.0)
  - [Need for cleaner, more polished client-facing spaces (Content OS, Notion, dashboards)](https://fathom.video/share/gjqxNSZR9PXZ91g5g2ZEmcyBzZikNWf1?tab=summary&timestamp=1532.0)

## Next Steps

  - Investigate use of Grammarly across all teams
  - Consider reintroducing style adapters to pipelines
  - Explore implementation of Gary's app for client task management
  - Review and improve clarity of client-facing spaces
  - Develop strategies for building long-term client trust to reduce review intensity
